title: Event Verification Open-Ended Task Annotation
description: Binary classification QA task annotation where the answer begins with 'Yes' or 'No' followed by an open-ended explanation. Each item asks a yes/no question about a video or image identified by video_id or image_id.

version.description: Schema version - must be '3.0' for this schema

items.description: Array of verification items, one per event to verify

video_id.description: Reference to video ID (matches directory name in contextual/)

question.description: Yes/no question about whether a specific event occurs in the video

answer.description: Answer starting with 'Yes' or 'No' followed by a period, a space, and an open-ended explanation (e.g. 'Yes. The car turns left at the intersection.')

reasoning.description: Optional step-by-step reasoning trace leading to the answer

metadata.description: File metadata for identification and cataloging

description.description: Human-readable description of this annotation file

license.description: License under which this annotation is distributed

tags.description: List of tags for categorization and search
